title: BI Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, airflow. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle bi analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V037: BI Analyst at NovaSoft. Location: Dnipro. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.6 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, airflow, looker, bigquery. Optional skills: dbt, forecasting. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
